title_en: 6. Tribulation leads the heart to relish the delight of patience: 7. Tribulation leads to a servant giving up dependency on the
content_en:
and to be content. This is a station of immense rank and impor- 16 'fabarani, al-Awsat #8442 on the authority of Jabir. HaythatnI, vol. 1 0, pg. 1 51 said, 'Its isnad contains Isl;iaq ibn 'Abdullah ibn Abii Farwa who is matriik .' 1 57 tance; the excellence of which we have already alluded to.

creation and leads him to turn to the Creator alone. Allah has told us that the polytheist turns to Allah sincerely when supplicating to Him at times of need, what then of the believer?!
